ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the passenger survived (1) or not (0) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (male, female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings or spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents or children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the passenger */,
  "last_known_address" TEXT /* Last known address of the passenger */,
  "travel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for travel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports ("port_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "related_passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related passenger */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sibling, spouse, parent, child) */,
  "relationship_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the relationship */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the related passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_related_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Code of the port (e.g., C, Q, S) */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the port */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the port city */,
  "radius" INTEGER /* Radius of the port (in meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_assignments" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck of the cabin */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "occupancy" INTEGER /* Number of passengers assigned to the cabin */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the cabin */,
  "view" TEXT /* View from the cabin */,
  "deck_layout" TEXT /* Layout of the deck */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_assignments_cabin_number FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_number") REFERENCES passengers ("cabin")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_details" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was issued */,
  "issuing_office" TEXT /* Office that issued the ticket */,
  "travel_class" TEXT /* Travel class (e.g., economy, business, first) */,
  "travel_route" TEXT /* Travel route */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_details_ticket_number FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_number") REFERENCES passengers ("ticket")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., early booking, group discount) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the discount */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the discount was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fare_discounts_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES ticket_details ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser and device information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival statistic */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of group (e.g., class, sex, age range) */,
  "survival_count" INTEGER /* Number of survivors in the group */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers in the group */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate of the group */,
  "survival_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the survival */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the survival data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare statistic */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of group (e.g., class, sex, age range) */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare paid by the group */,
  "min_fare" REAL /* Minimum fare paid by the group */,
  "max_fare" REAL /* Maximum fare paid by the group */,
  "total_fare" REAL /* Total fare paid by the group */,
  "fare_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the fare */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the fare data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_details" (
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the port of embarkation */,
  "embarkation_date" TEXT /* Date of embarkation */,
  "embarkation_time" TEXT /* Time of embarkation */,
  "boarding_area" TEXT /* Boarding area */,
  "boarding_group" TEXT /* Boarding group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_embarkation_details_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_embarkation_details_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disembarkation_details" (
  "disembarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disembarkation event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the port of disembarkation */,
  "disembarkation_date" TEXT /* Date of disembarkation */,
  "disembarkation_time" TEXT /* Time of disembarkation */,
  "disembarkation_area" TEXT /* Disembarkation area */,
  "disembarkation_group" TEXT /* Disembarkation group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disembarkation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disembarkation_details_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disembarkation_details_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin history event */,
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cabin */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "previous_cabin" TEXT /* Previous cabin assignment */,
  "new_cabin" TEXT /* New cabin assignment */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cabin change */,
  "change_initiator" TEXT /* Who initiated the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_history_cabin_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_id") REFERENCES cabin_assignments ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_history_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket history event */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "previous_fare" REAL /* Previous fare */,
  "new_fare" REAL /* New fare */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "change_initiator" TEXT /* Who initiated the change */,
  "change_approval" TEXT /* Approval status of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES ticket_details ("ticket_id")
)
